summary: Completed testing of P0/P1 features: ShipRocket webhook URL rename, Google Analytics integration, Amazon QR placeholder, and Partner With Us distributor inquiry. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirms all features implemented correctly.

1_webhook_url_renamed.details: GET /api/shipping/webhook/test returns webhook_url: '/api/shipping/webhook/tracking-updates' - avoiding 'shiprocket' keyword restriction

2_webhook_tracking_endpoint.details: POST /api/shipping/webhook/tracking-updates correctly processes shipment status updates with proper status mapping (shipped, delivered, in_transit, etc.)

4_google_analytics_integrated.details: GA Measurement ID G-9CBN63VGCK configured in frontend/.env and analytics.js. gtag script loads from googletagmanager.com with correct ID.

5_amazon_qr_placeholder.details: InstagramFeed.jsx shows 'Amazon Coming Soon' placeholder with data-testid='amazon-qr-placeholder'. Amazon QR is disabled until actual QR image is ready.

6_partner_with_us_button.details: Footer.jsx has Partner With Us button with data-testid='partner-with-us-btn' that opens distributor inquiry modal via openInquiry('distributor')

7_distributor_inquiry_modal.details: InquiryModal shows 'Partnership Inquiry' title with 'Become a regional distributor for Addrika' subtitle. Shows Login Required prompt for unauthenticated users.

8_distributor_form_fields.details: InquiryModal.jsx has distributor-specific fields: Business Type (dropdown with retailer, wholesaler, supermarket, etc.), Target Region (text input), Industry Experience (dropdown with years)

backend_api_tests.test_webhook_status_mapping: PASSED - All status IDs map correctly (1→processing, 6→shipped, 7→delivered, etc.)
backend_api_tests.test_analytics_js_has_correct_id: PASSED - analytics.js has correct GA ID
backend_api_tests.test_instagram_feed_has_amazon_placehold: PASSED - Amazon Coming Soon placeholder configured
backend_api_tests.test_footer_has_partner_button: PASSED - Partner With Us button with data-testid

critical_code_review_comments: ShipRocket webhook URL successfully renamed from 'shiprocket' to 'tracking-updates' to avoid keyword restrictions
All webhook status codes properly mapped (1=processing, 6=shipped, 7=delivered, 17=out_for_delivery, etc.)
Google Analytics G-9CBN63VGCK integrated - script loads and gtag function defined on page load
Partner With Us button correctly styled in gold (metallic-gold color) and positioned in Quick Links footer section
Distributor inquiry requires login - shows appropriate 'Login Required' prompt for unauthenticated users
Amazon QR placeholder shows 'Coming Soon' state - will need actual QR image when Amazon store is ready
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tested webhook endpoints with test payloads
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 features from this iteration are working. ShipRocket webhook at /api/shipping/webhook/tracking-updates. GA ID G-9CBN63VGCK active. Partner With Us opens distributor inquiry modal (requires login). Amazon placeholder shows 'Coming Soon'. To test distributor form fields when authenticated, user registration is needed (admin login is separate from user login).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features implemented and working correctly
